hero.title: Portfolio Creator
hero.description: Build a professional portfolio from profiles, projects, skills, and publish settings.

differences.title: A portfolio built around evidence
differences.description: Portfolio Creator keeps profile context, work samples, skills, and publish readiness connected in one workflow.

items.title: Profile foundation
items.description: Capture the public name, headline, summary, location, and website for the portfolio.

items.title: Project proof
items.description: Document projects with roles, descriptions, links, and display order.

items.title: Publish readiness
items.description: Prepare visibility, slug, theme, and publish state without promoting anything automatically.

feel.title: A clear portfolio-building loop
feel.description: The workflow moves from identity to proof, skills, and publish preparation.

items.title: Add work samples
items.description: Show the projects that support the story.

items.title: Prepare to share
items.description: Set skills and publish settings when the profile is ready.

audiences.title: Who uses Portfolio Creator
audiences.description: Useful for people who need to present professional work clearly.

items.title: Students
items.description: Present coursework, capstone projects, and growing skills.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Showcase career achievements and specialist experience.

items.title: Freelancers
items.description: Build a clear body of work for potential clients.

resourceSection.title: Portfolio essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep the portfolio profile, projects, skills, and publish settings together.

items.title: Profile
items.description: Capture the professional introduction and contact context.

items.title: Projects
items.description: Document work samples, roles, links, and outcomes.

items.title: Publish settings
items.description: Prepare visibility, slug, theme, and published state.

groupedSection.title: Move from profile to publish readiness
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for portfolio preparation.

items.name: Projects

items.name: Skills
items.description: Organize capabilities by category and proficiency.

items.name: Publish
items.description: Prepare visibility, slug, theme, and publish status.

technicalSection.title: Designed for isolated portfolio data
technicalSection.description: Portfolio Creator follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Current-user owned profiles, projects, skills, and publish settings.
